title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the value of art and history.

questions.question: Should public money be spent on art when there are other social problems to solve?
Is digital art as valuable as a physical painting in a museum?

script.text: Should public money be spent on art when there are other social problems to solve?
Is digital art as valuable as a physical painting in a museum?
Is it important for a country to preserve its historical artifacts, even if it's expensive?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
